goal: Summarize a paper that just came out, then implement it: p-less sampling (arXiv:2509.23234)

nodes.detail: query: '2026 new LLM sampling decoding method paper logits simple algorithm'
nodes.label: search: new LLM sampling 2026

nodes.detail: query: 'truncation sampling min-p top-n sigma successor paper' -> surfaced p-less (2509.23234)
nodes.label: search: truncation samplers

nodes.detail: arxiv.org/html/2509.23234v1 -> exact algorithm: L[P]=ΣP(v)^2, keep P(v)>=L[P]
nodes.label: fetch: arXiv full HTML

nodes.detail: raw p_less_samplers.py -> p=probs.square().sum(); mask probs<p; renorm; multinomial
nodes.label: fetch: reference code

nodes.detail: p-less: threshold = collision likelihood L[P]=ΣP(v)^2 (=exp(-H2), Renyi-2 entropy); keep tokens with P(v)>=L[P]; renormalize; sample. Hyperparameter-free. argmax always kept since maxP>=ΣP^2, so set is non-empty.
nodes.label: extract algorithm

nodes.detail: demos/coding-agent/generated/p_less.py — softmax, collision_likelihood, p_less_filter, p_less_sample (pure stdlib, CPU)
nodes.label: write p_less.py

nodes.detail: tests/unit/test_p_less.py — 9 cases: threshold, uniform-keeps-all, peaked-keeps-top, argmax-survives, renorm, flatter-keeps-more, determinism, temperature
nodes.label: write test_p_less.py
